chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Const. Petition No. D-5810 of 2025 __________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature(s) of Judge(s) Hearing 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 04.03.2026 None present for the petitioner Mrs. Shazia Hanjrah, DAG M/s. Hakim Ali Shaikh and Sageer Ahmed Abbasi, Additional Advocates General, Sindh alongwith SI/Additional SHO Ghulam Asghar Abbasi, PS Jackson ---------------------- None present for the petitioner, similar was the position on the last date of hearing. Additional SHO, P.S Jackson is present and files statement to the effect that missing person namely Noman Shah S/o Shah Mehmood has been shown arrested in crime No.315 of 2026 registered with P.S S.I.U, Karachi under section 93(E) & 99 CNS Act, 2024, taken on record. Since the missing person has been surfaced therefore purpose of this petition has been served. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed having become infructuous. JUDGE HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE B-K Soomro
